name: Whetstone Shard
description: First attack each combat deals +6 damage.

name: Bronze Pauldron
description: Combat start: +5 Armor and +1 Rage.

name: Stamina Flask
description: +4 Max Stamina; +2 Stamina at combat start.

name: Battered Vambrace
description: On Brace (armor break): +2 Rage and +3 Armor at start of next turn.

name: Iron Cestus
description: Every 4th damage card: +50% damage and applies 3 Bleed.

name: Banded Greaves
description: On hit taken: gain Armor = 25% of damage prevented (cap +12/combat) and +1 Rage.

name: Stamina Reservoir
description: Combat start: convert each 3 unspent Stamina from previous combat into +1 STR for this combat (cap +5).

name: War-God's Mantle
description: All defense cards cost 0 Stamina. While Armor ≥10, Fortified triggers fire permanently.

name: Bloodgorged Heart
description: Self-Bleed/Self-Burn ticks heal 1 HP and grant +1 Rage. While Rage ≥10, Berserk bonuses double.

name: The Last Banner
description: Combat start: +12 Armor, +5 Rage, +5 Stamina. 1/combat, when you would die, survive at 1 HP and gain Empower 50% for 6s.

name: Aether Lens
description: +8 Max Mana; +3 Mana at combat start.

name: Burnt Tome
description: Each Burn tick on an enemy grants +1 Mana (cap 8/combat).

name: Frostbite Charm
description: On Slow application: enemy also takes 2 damage.

name: Ember Wick
description: The first Fire card each combat applies +2 Burn.

name: Stormglass Lens
description: Applying 3+ Slow in one cast also applies 1 Stun. Strip enemy stun-immunity for 2s.

name: Cinder Circlet
description: Burn ticks deal +1 damage per 3 INT. Pyre detonations gain +25% damage.

name: Mana Veil
description: On hit taken: spend up to 6 Mana to negate damage 1:1.

name: Tempest Resonator
description: Every 4th Magic card refunds its mana cost AND Echoes 1.

name: Tideheart Amulet
description: Combat start: +1 Max Mana per 10% HP missing. On heal: +2 Max Mana for combat (cap +12). Heals also apply 2 Slow to nearest enemy.

name: Archon Codex
description: 1/combat: on reaching 0 Mana, refund 12 Mana and your next Magic card costs 0 and Echoes 1.

name: Bronze Scale
description: +15 Max HP.

name: Energy Tonic
description: +6 Max Stamina; +2 Stamina at combat start.

name: Arcane Crystal
description: +10 Max Mana; +3 Mana at combat start.

name: Whetting Stone
description: +1 STR.

name: Iron Brace
description: +1 VIT.

name: Quick Boots
description: +1 DEX.

name: Scholar's Quill
description: +1 INT.

name: Soul Locket
description: +1 SPI.

name: Vitality Ring
description: +10 Max HP, +4 Max Stamina.

name: Hearty Meal
description: Loop-end heal +50% and grants +2 Stamina.

name: Lucky Coin
description: +2 gold from every kill.

name: Travel Boots
description: On entering each tile: heal +1 HP.

name: Beacon Lantern
description: Relic prices -10%; +2 relics for each shop.

name: Smoldering Torch
description: First card each combat costs 0.

name: Iron Tooth
description: First attack each combat: +5 damage and +3 Armor.

name: Vanguard Cuffs
description: Your first 3 cards each combat cost -1 Stamina (min 0).

name: Charm of Tides
description: Combat start: +1 Mana and +1 Stamina.

name: Steady Compass
description: Cards played in the first 3 seconds of combat cost 50% less.

name: Linen Wrap
description: Self-Bleed/Self-Burn ticks deal -1 damage (min 0).

name: Tarnished Mirror
description: On hit taken: 25% chance to refund 1 Stamina or 1 Mana.

name: Echoing Chime
description: Every 6th card played: refund 2 Mana.

name: Brass Bell
description: Combat start: enemy starts with 3 Bleed.

name: Trailblazer's Brand
description: First time you enter a Combat tile each loop: heal 5 HP and +1 Stamina/+1 Mana.

name: Veteran's Stripe
description: +1 STR per elite or boss defeated this run (cap +5).

name: Swift Boots
description: Card cooldowns reduced by 12%.

name: Thin Deck Charm
description: Deck size ≤7: +35% card damage and +1 card draw at combat start.

name: Heavy Tome
description: Deck size ≥10: +20% damage and +4 Max HP per excess card past 10.

name: Iron Will
description: On hit taken: +3 Armor (cap +15/combat).

name: First Strike Amulet
description: First card each combat deals ×2.5 damage.

name: Gravedigger's Tag
description: On kill: +3 gold and +3 HP.

name: Huntmaster's Eye
description: On kill: +1 STR for combat (cap +6).

name: Librarian's Seal
description: Every 5th card played: refund 3 Mana.

name: Apothecary's Vial
description: Combat start: gain a one-time Barrier that fully blocks the next hit.

name: Harmonics Charm
description: Every 5th card played: refund 1 Stamina AND 1 Mana.

name: Glasswork Lens
description: +25% damage to enemies above 75% HP.

name: Executioner's Brand
description: +35% damage to enemies below 30% HP.

name: Counterweight Sigil
description: On hit taken: your next card costs 0 (consumed on play).

name: Burnished Sigil
description: Every 3rd Defense card grants Armor ×1.5.

name: Vampiric Fang
description: Damaging hits heal 1 HP (cap 3/sec).

name: Smoking Censer
description: On Brace (armor break): apply 4 Burn to nearest enemy.

name: Roaring Hourglass
description: First 4s of combat: card cooldowns -50%.

name: Lodestone Pendant
description: On loop completion: heal 8 HP and +1 Stamina/+1 Mana.

name: Cracked Crystal
description: Combat start: take 6 self-damage, gain +3 STR and +3 INT for combat.

name: Whisperwind Sash
description: Every 3 cards played: +1 DEX for combat (cap +5).

name: Ash Eater
description: On Pyre detonation: +1 Mana and +1 Stamina; next card costs -1 of each.

name: Sanguine Pact
description: +1 STR and +1 INT per 20% Max HP missing (cap +5 each). Each Self-Bleed/Self-Burn tick deals 2 damage to the nearest enemy.

name: Berserker Ring
description: +60% STR, -25% Max HP. All Berserk bonuses double.

name: Phoenix Feather
description: 1/run, when you would die: revive at 60% HP and gain Empower 100% for 8s.

name: Demon Heart
description: Each combat's first 6s: cards deal ×2 damage. You take 1 self-damage per card during this window.

name: Stoneheart Sigil
description: Armor floor = 5 (cannot drop below). When Armor would break, gain +6 Armor at start of next turn instead.

name: Pandora's Embers
description: Combat start: apply 3 of a random non-Rage stack (Burn/Bleed/Poison/Slow/Stun) to the lead enemy. Re-rolled each combat.

name: Cinderkeep
description: Burn tick damage = ⌈current Burn / 4⌉ (min 2). Pyre detonations deal +25% damage.

name: Crimson Stiletto
description: Bleed ticks fire 2× faster. Bleed stacks no longer decay on the same tick they were applied.

name: Stormcaller's Rod
description: Slow cap raised from 50% to 80%. Frost Echo triggers fire twice.

name: Echo Chamber
description: Every 5th card played triggers Echo 1. Echoed copies cost nothing.

name: Catalyst Core
description: All Catalyze multipliers +1 (×2 → ×3). multiply_stack effects ignore caps.

name: Soulforge Chalice
description: Convert effects also re-apply 50% of the source stack to the enemy after consuming.

name: Glass Cannon
description: Take +50% damage from all sources; deal +75% damage from cards.

name: Hemlock Vial
description: Poison stacks no longer decay. Each Poison tick has a 25% chance to apply +1 Poison.

name: Constellation Sigil
description: For each unique element in your deck, gain +1 to its primary stat (STR/VIT/DEX/INT/SPI).
